name: Chocolate Surprise Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
From: Baker's Chocolate Cookbook
FILLING:
powdered sugar (optional)
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat cream cheese, 1/3 cup granulated sugar, and 1 egg until smooth. Stir in chocolate chips; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat melted chocolate, oil, flour, 1 cup granulated sugar, water, 1 egg, vanilla extract, baking soda, and salt with a wire whisk or fork until blended and smooth.
4. Spoon half the batter evenly into 18 greased or paper-lined muffin cups. Top each with about 1 tablespoon of the cream cheese mixture.
5. Spoon the remaining batter over the top of the cream cheese mixture.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from pans and cool on wire racks. Sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired.
Prep time: 15 minutes. Bake time: 30 to 35 minutes.
